caption: Record Integrity
description: The Record Integrity profile adds a cryptographic attestation over the event record itself, providing integrity, authenticity, and non-repudiation independent of any domain-specific content. It is domain-agnostic and may be applied alongside other profiles. The attestation is computed over a canonical serialization of the record; multiple signers (e.g., producer plus a co-signature, notary, or witness over the same record) are carried in the attestation's signatures array.
name: record_integrity
